title: Study overview
discoveryConditions: Player requests an overview of the study.
textFallback: The study contains a writing desk, fireplace, display case, tallcase clock, tea trolley, green-shaded lamp, and rain-streaked window.

title: Locked display case
discoveryConditions: Player inspects or requests the display case.
textFallback: The case has an intact front lock, but the rear hinge is loose and freshly disturbed.

title: Tallcase clock
discoveryConditions: Player inspects or requests the clock.
textFallback: The tallcase clock has stopped at 8:13 and its lower latch shows a fresh scrape.

title: Breguet pocket watch
discoveryConditions: Player discovers the watch inside the clock.
textFallback: The missing gold pocket watch is wrapped in a polishing cloth inside the clock compartment.
